Description: The unit cost per vector control (unamortized).

A list of **NodeProperty** key:value pairs that cause an intervention to be aborted (persistent interventions will stop being distributed to nodes with these values). See :ref:`demo-properties` parameters for more information.
Prevents a node from receiving a new intervention with the same **Intervention_Name**.
The portion of the targeted habitat that is treated with microsporidia.

The larval habitat type to target with the intervention. If not ALL_HABITATS, the type must be one of those configured in **Vector_Species_Params**, **Habitats** for the species that the microsporidia strain infects. See :doc:`parameter-configuration-larval` parameters for more information. Possible values are:

* ALL_HABITATS
* TEMPORARY_RAINFALL
* WATER_VEGETATION
* HUMAN_POPULATION
* CONSTANT
* BRACKISH_SWAMP
* LINEAR_SPLINE
The configuration of the daily microsporidia infectivity applied to larvae and its waning over time. Specify how this effect decays over time using one of the :doc:`parameter-campaign-waningeffects`.
The optional name used to refer to this intervention as a means to differentiate it from others that use the same class.
An optional **NodeProperty** key:value pair that will be assigned when the intervention is applied. See :ref:`demo-properties` parameters for more information.

The name of the microsporidia strain used by the intervention to infect the larvae. This must match a strain defined in **Vector_Species_Params**, **Microsporidia**. Since microsporidia strain names must be unique between the species, you don't need to specify the target species.
